Bible: Init Project.description: Initialize project with the Bible decision tree — creates CLAUDE.md, detects stack, configures modes

Bible: Plan Feature.description: Create an implementation plan before coding — breaks work into steps with dependencies

Bible: Verify.description: Run verification loop — tests pass, no errors, feature works end-to-end

Bible: Command Center.description: Open the Bible command center — interactive menu for all commands

Bible: Switch Mode.description: Switch workflow mode — changes behavior, verbosity, risk tolerance, and auto-loaded skills

Bible: Browse Prompts.description: Browse battle-tested prompt templates by category

body: /tdd ${1:describe the feature or function to test}
Bible: TDD Workflow.description: Start test-driven development — write test first (RED), implement (GREEN), refactor (IMPROVE)

Bible: Code Review.description: Multi-perspective code review on current changes

Bible: Checkpoint.description: Create a git safety checkpoint — conventional commit with current changes

body: /task-commander ${1:describe the large feature to break down and parallelize}
Bible: Task Commander.description: Break a large feature into subtasks, dispatch parallel subagents, track progress

body: ${1:describe the batch job, migration, or long-running task}

Bible: Orchestrate.description: Multi-agent orchestration — break work into parallel subtasks dispatched to subagents

Bible: Deploy.description: Build, test, and deploy pipeline — pre-flight checks, build, push, verify

Bible: Build Fix.description: Auto-resolve build errors — analyzes error output, fixes incrementally, verifies

Bible: Save Session.description: Persist current session context to disk for later restoration

Bible: Resume Session.description: Restore the last saved session context and continue where you left off

Bible: Harness Audit.description: Validate Bible installation — checks skills, hooks, commands, and configuration health

Bible: Grill Me.description: Socratic planning probe — asks probing questions before you start building

Bible: Confidence Check.description: Pre-execution confidence assessment — scores confidence across 4 dimensions before proceeding

Bible: Context Budget.description: Visual context window analyzer — shows usage gauge, zone indicators, and bloat sources

body: /learn ${1:describe the pattern or lesson to extract and persist}
Bible: Learn.description: Extract a reusable pattern from current work and save to learned skills

body: 1. Correctness — does it do what it claims?
2. Security — any vulnerabilities, injection risks, exposed secrets?
3. Performance — any N+1 queries, unnecessary re-renders, memory leaks?
4. Maintainability — clear names, small functions, no deep nesting?
5. Edge cases — what happens with empty input, null, concurrent access?
Prompt: Code Review.description: Structured code review prompt — 5 dimensions with specific questions

body: I have a bug. Help me debug it systematically.
Prompt: Debug.description: Structured debugging prompt — systematic approach with reproduction steps

body: 1. List all files that need to change
3. Break into ordered steps (each independently testable)
5. Flag any architectural decisions that need discussion
Prompt: Plan Feature.description: Structured planning prompt — requirements, dependencies, ordered steps, risks

body: Build a landing page for ${1:product name}.
Sections: hero with gradient animation, features grid (3 columns),
testimonials carousel, pricing table (${2:3} tiers), and CTA section.
Prompt: Landing Page.description: Landing page prompt — sections, responsive, accessible, animated

Prompt: API Endpoint.description: API endpoint prompt — route, validation, auth, testing

body: Design a database schema for: ${1:describe the domain}
Prompt: Database Schema.description: Database schema design prompt — entities, indexes, constraints, migrations
